questionHtml: State two properties of the products of nuclear fission due to which the spent nuclear fuel needs to be kept safe.
markschemeHtml:
Have relatively short half-lives / high activity ✓ 

Their decay products are «usually» also radioactive ✓ 

Volatile / chemically active ✓

Biologically active / easily absorbed by living matter ✓

meta.title: State two properties of the products of nuclear fission due to which the spent nuclear fuel needs to be kept safe.
